mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in payroll employment raises household income expectations and lowers near-term recession risk, causing higher S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2005-12 was 134468 thousand persons
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with continuing job creation
failure_condition: Reject if months with positive 3-month PAYEMS momentum do not have higher subsequent 20-day SPX returns than months with negative momentum, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 4.0%, restrictive policy raises discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2005-12 was 4.16 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases and their mean forward return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in housing starts during a period of elevated policy rates signals housing-led demand deterioration, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls over 3 months while FEDFUNDS is above 4.0%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2005-11 was 2123 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger is followed by non-negative 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if HOUST declines alone explain the effect without FEDFUNDS interaction.

mechanism_narrative: Positive retail sales momentum indicates resilient household demand and supports near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2005-12 was 357841 million dollars
failure_condition: Reject if positive 1-month RSAFS growth is followed by below-baseline 5-day SPX returns in two consecutive walk-forward years or if the hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improving factory output and operating leverage, increasing expected cyclical earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2005-11 was 108.96 index points
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO accelerations have lower average 60-day SPX returns than non-triggered observations, or if the 60-day return spread is negative in most walk-forward folds.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI inflation while the policy rate is already high signals pressure for further tightening and margin compression, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds 3.0% while FEDFUNDS is above 4.0%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation and high-rate trigger does not produce lower 20-day SPX returns than either high CPI momentum alone or high FEDFUNDS alone.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate from a low level marks deterioration in labor-market momentum and increases recession-risk pricing, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months from a starting level below 5.5%
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2005-12 was 4.9 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment upturns are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases and the mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Real activity strength across GDP and retail sales signals durable demand growth, lifting expected corporate cash flows and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarterly growth is positive and RSAFS 3-month growth is positive
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value for 2005-07 was 11202.3 billions of chained 2017 dollars
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive GDPC1 and RSAFS trigger fails to outperform the unconditional 20-day SPX return distribution or if either single proxy fully subsumes the joint signal.
